name: 碎玉 · 天下
note: Modular region graph: every area is a world/<id>.json plugged in via border exits (sim/overworld.py cross()). 'built' areas load today; 'planned' areas are sockets — author the file in the hebei/henan pattern, register it here, link the exits, and the realm grows. zhongyuan.json is the composed grand-map preview of the whole.
